event: presented to emergency department after seizure-like activity
3 cm laceration on medial aspect of forehead
seizure-like activities (altered mental status, diffuse shaking movements)
CT head without contrast (small frontal scalp hematoma)
MRI brain and brainstem (progressive periventricular white matter lesions)
ROSC after five rounds of resuscitative efforts
hypokinesis of anterior, anteroseptal, apical segments
CT angiogram chest (no significant coronary calcifications)
